summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Development and Sustainability in socialscience.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 8 socialscience explains the core concepts of Development and Sustainability. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.

key_concepts.title: Introduction to Development and Sustainability
key_concepts.explanation: This concept introduces the basic idea of Development and Sustainability.

key_concepts.title: Core ideas in Development and Sustainability
key_concepts.explanation: This concept covers the main principles and important points in Development and Sustainability.

key_concepts.title: Applications of Development and Sustainability
key_concepts.explanation: This concept explains common uses, examples, or relevance of Development and Sustainability.

practice_questions.question: What is the main idea introduced in the chapter 'Development and Sustainability'?
practice_questions.answer: The chapter 'Development and Sustainability' introduces foundational concepts in socialscience for Class 8.

practice_questions.question: Explain one important concept from the chapter 'Development and Sustainability'.
practice_questions.answer: One important concept from 'Development and Sustainability' is understanding its core ideas and how they apply within socialscience.

practice_questions.question: How can the ideas from 'Development and Sustainability' be applied in a practical learning context?
practice_questions.answer: The ideas from 'Development and Sustainability' can be applied by solving examples, analyzing situations, and connecting concepts to real learning problems in socialscience.

mcqs.question: What is the main focus of the chapter 'Development and Sustainability'?

options.A: Understanding the core concepts of Development and Sustainability

mcqs.explanation: The chapter 'Development and Sustainability' mainly focuses on understanding its core concepts in socialscience for Class 8.

mcqs.question: Which of the following best describes a useful way to study 'Development and Sustainability'?
mcqs.explanation: A useful way to study 'Development and Sustainability' is by reviewing the concepts carefully and practicing relevant questions.

mcqs.question: Why is 'Development and Sustainability' important in the study of socialscience?

options.A: Because it replaces all other chapters
options.B: Because it has no connection to the subject
options.C: Because it builds understanding of important ideas within socialscience
options.D: Because it is only useful for memorization

mcqs.explanation: 'Development and Sustainability' is important because it helps build understanding of major ideas and their relevance within socialscience.
